commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=65a1271e83c0b771528c5a162a4173326188530d)
commands.review_summary:
The branch retains a longer transcript-backed or actively streamed Telegram partial preview when an ellipsis-truncated final arrives, exports transcript lookup through the session-store runtime facade, adds regression tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: no. live high-confidence reproduction was run in this review. The linked issue gives a concrete Telegram group-topic partial-stream path, and current main source shows the preview-finalized text is mirrored back into the transcript, so the bug is source-reproducible with medium confidence.
commands.review_followup: This draft maintainer-labeled PR needs author or maintainer follow-up for real Telegram proof and the SDK API baseline; automation should not request a repair lane while the proof gate is unmet.
